descriptions: IS-CP is an official affiliate of IS.
edges.evidence_quote: Islamic State – Caucasus Province (IS-CP) is active in the North Caucasus region of Russia. IS announced the group's formation in 2015.

descriptions: IS-AP's adherents were recruited by IS-CP.
edges.evidence_quote: Its adeherents were previously recruited by both the Islamic State – Caucasus Province (IS-CP) and Islamic State – Khorasan Province (ISIS-K).

Bonde do Maluco.description: Brazilian criminal organization based in Bahia, founded in 2015 by Alexandre (Xandeco) and others as an offshoot of the defunct Caveira faction. Specializes in drug trafficking, robberies, kidnappings, and murders. Currently the largest criminal organization in Bahia, with an estimated 15,000 members and allied with the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco originated as an offshoot of the defunct Caveira faction.
edges.evidence_quote: The group was born as an offshoot of a defunct criminal faction known as Caveira

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco originated as a branch of the extinct Caveira faction.
edges.evidence_quote: O grupo nasceu como uma ramificação de uma extinta facção criminosa conhecida como Caveira

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco considers Comando Vermelho a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Its rivals include the Comando Vermelho (CV)

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco has Comando Vermelho as a rival in Salvador.
edges.evidence_quote: Tem como rivais o Comando Vermelho (CV) e a Katiara dentro da capital baiana

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco is allied with Guardiões do Estado according to the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Primeiro Comando da Capital , Terceiro Comando Puro , Guardiões do Estado

descriptions: GDE is listed as an ally of Bonde do Maluco in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , TCP , GDE , OKD , SDC , MPA

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco considers Katiara a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Its rivals include the Comando Vermelho (CV) and Katiara

edges.evidence_quote: Tem como rivais o Comando Vermelho (CV) e a Katiara dentro da capital baiana

edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , TCP , GDE , OKD , SDC , MPA

edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , TCP , GDE , OKD , SDC , MPA

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco is allied with the PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: The criminal group is allied with the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco is allied with PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: O grupo criminoso é aliado da facção criminosa Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco considers Primeiro Comando de Eunápolis an enemy in the interior of Bahia.
edges.evidence_quote: no interior do estado, teria como inimigos os aliados do grupo carioca, como o Primeiro Comando de Eunápolis.

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco is allied with Primeiro Comando de Eunápolis in the interior of Bahia.
edges.evidence_quote: in the interior of the state, it is said to have allies of the Rio de Janeiro gang, such as the Primeiro Comando de Eunápolis.

edges.target: Sindicato do Crime do Rio Grande do Norte
descriptions: SDC is listed as an ally of Bonde do Maluco in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , TCP , GDE , OKD , SDC , MPA

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Primeiro Comando da Capital , Terceiro Comando Puro , Guardiões do Estado

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Bonde do Maluco ...

descriptions: PCC lists BDM as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Latin America : TCP , GDE , BDM , EPP , FARC , Tren de Aragua , Jalisco Cartel , Massa Carcerária [ pt ] , Primer Cartel Uruguayo.

edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: GDE , Nova Okaida , BDM , TCP B40

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonde do Maluco

descriptions: BDM é listado como aliado do TCP na infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: BDM

descriptions: Marino clan later fought against Scissionisti.
edges.evidence_quote: Eventually, after the Scampia feud, the Marino clan went to war against the Scissionisti.

descriptions: Marino clan was initially allied as military wing, later went to war.
edges.evidence_quote: Marino clan (Case Celesti, Secondigliano) - Boss: Gennaro Marino ... Head of the military wing of the Scissionisti. Eventually, after the Scampia feud, the Marino clan went to war against the Scissionisti.

descriptions: Infobox lists FOB Killers gang as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: FOB Killers gang(FK gang)

Nine Trey Gangsters.description: A set of the United Blood Nation street gang, founded in 1993 on Rikers Island, New York City, by Omar Portee and Leonard McKenzie. The gang operates primarily on the East Coast of the United States, engaging in drug trafficking, sex trafficking, racketeering, robbery, and counterfeiting. It has been the target of multiple federal investigations and prosecutions.

descriptions: Lucchese family lists Nine Trey Gangsters as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nine Trey Gangsters

edges.source: Lucchese crime family New Jersey faction
descriptions: The New Jersey faction allied with Nine Trey Gangsters to smuggle drugs and phones into prison.
edges.evidence_quote: It also revealed that members of the Lucchese family's New Jersey faction had an alliance with a New Jersey corrections officer and members of the Nine Trey Gangster's (a set of the Bloods) to smuggle drugs and pre-paid cell phones into East Jersey State Prison in Woodbridge.

descriptions: Nine Trey Gangsters are a set of the Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Nine Trey Gangster's (a set of the Bloods)

descriptions: The Crips are listed as rivals of Nine Trey Gangsters in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Crips

descriptions: A high-ranking Nine Trey Gangsters member has ties to the Lucchese crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: A "five star general", or high ranking member, of the Nine Trey Gangsters with ties to the Lucchese crime family was arrested in December 2023

descriptions: Nine Trey Gangsters allied with Lucchese crime family for smuggling.
edges.evidence_quote: the UBN's Nine Trey Gangsters faction entered into an alliance with the Lucchese crime family to smuggle drugs and pre-paid cell phones into East Jersey State Prison

descriptions: Nine Trey Gangsters is a set (sub-unit) of United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Nine Trey Gangster Bloods or Nine Trey Gangsta Bloods ( NTG ) (also known simply as Nine Trey Gangsters or referred to as Bentley's or Billionaires ) are a " set " of the United Blood Nation street gang

descriptions: Nine Trey Gangsters is a faction of the United Blood Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: the Nine Trey Gangsters (NTG) faction of the UBN

descriptions: Butler Blocc Crips are rivals of Lueders Park Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: The house was located within the territory of the Lueders Park Piru, but was used as a "hang-out" by members of a rival gang known as the Butler Blocc Crips.

descriptions: 12st Players are rivals of Latin Counts per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sureños, 12st Players, Almighty Bishops, 4GMz, SVLz, Latin Kings, Two Six, 22Boys, Almighty Ambrose, La Raza, Satan Disciples, Krazy Getdown Boys, Imperial Gangsters, Maniac Latin Disciples, Spanish Gangster Disciples, Insane Deuces, Folk Nation

descriptions: La Rompe ONU is listed as a rival of the Puerto Rican Mob in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Rompe ONU , The Corporation , Paulino Castillo Organization (conflict with some families) , Mau Maus (defunct) , Medellín Cartel (defunct) , Gulf Cartel , Grupo 27

descriptions: La Rompe ONU is a rival organization engaged in a violent war against ONU.
edges.evidence_quote: La Rompe ONU ("ONU Breakers") is a rival organization which is also devoted to the drug trade in Puerto Rico. Rompe ONU was first organized by several former ONU members and has been involved in a violent war against ONU members.

descriptions: Infobox lists La Rompe ONU as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Rompe ONU

descriptions: La Rompe ONU is listed as an enemy of Ñetas in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: 20 LUV, Dominicans Don't Play, Grupo 27, Latin Kings, La Rompe ONU, Los Solidos, Trinitarios, United Blood Nation

descriptions: Undertakers patched over to become Bandidos in Finland.
edges.evidence_quote: The Undertakers established relations with the Bandidos in Denmark and became a probationary chapter in August 1995 before being patched over on 5 October 1996

descriptions: Undertakers MC was reestablished by a former Bandidos president after expulsion.
edges.evidence_quote: Hirsma reestablished his former club Undertakers MC after being expelled from the Bandidos that year, and also made contact with the Outlaws.

descriptions: Undertakers MC became a Bandidos probationary chapter and later patched over.
edges.evidence_quote: He had been returning from a meeting with the Undertakers Motorcycle Club – a Finnish club that became a Bandidos probationary chapter the following month before being patched over in October 1996

descriptions: Cannonball was in conflict with Undertakers MC during the Nordic Biker War.
edges.evidence_quote: As a Hells Angels support club, Cannonball was aligned with the HA prospect chapter Overkill MC against the Undertakers MC, a prospect club of the Bandidos, during the Nordic Biker War in the 1990s.

descriptions: Undertakers MC is a local support club for Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: Other support clubs range from local groups, such as the Undertakers MC in Lexington, Kentucky, to regional clubs like the Chosen Few MC, which is based in Canada and Upstate New York.

descriptions: Overkill MC and Undertakers MC were on opposing sides in the Nordic Biker War.
edges.evidence_quote: As a Hells Angels support club, Cannonball was aligned with the HA prospect chapter Overkill MC against the Undertakers MC, a prospect club of the Bandidos, during the Nordic Biker War in the 1990s.

descriptions: Undertakers merged into Bandidos as a chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: the Undertakers were patched over by the Bandidos on 17 December 1993.

descriptions: Undertakers MC was a prospect club of Bandidos.
edges.evidence_quote: Undertakers MC, a prospect club of the Bandidos

Daybreak Boys.description: The Daybreak Boys was a New York City street gang formed in the late 1840s. Active along the waterfront, they were known for unprovoked murder, sabotage, and theft. By 1852, they were suspected of 20 to 40 murders and stealing $200,000 in goods. The gang was broken up by police in 1859 after several gunfights.

descriptions: Loughborough Bois merged with GAS Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Another gang, Loughborough Bois based in Loughborough Junction, decided to merge with GAS Gang.

descriptions: Dalen Network is affiliated with Farsta yngre.
edges.evidence_quote: the Dalen Network, which appears to be affiliated with Farsta yngre among other things

descriptions: Foxtrot commits violent crimes against Dalen Network.
edges.evidence_quote: People hired by the Foxtrot network and Majid have committed several violent crimes against the Dalen Network and their allies.

descriptions: The Mariano and Di Blasi clans fought a bloody war in the late 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: prima faida dei Quartieri Spagnoli : combattuta tra i clan Mariano, detti i picuozzi , e Di Blasi, detti i faiano , alla fine degli anni ottanta

descriptions: Clan Mariano was at war with Faiano (Di Biasi) in the early 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan dei Mariano fu in guerra prima con i Faiano (i Di Biasi) e poi con l' Alleanza di Secondigliano agli inizi degli anni novanta per il controllo dei Quartieri Spagnoli.

descriptions: The Di Blasi and Russo clans fought a war in the late 1990s and early 2000s.
edges.evidence_quote: terza faida dei Quartieri Spagnoli : fu la guerra combattuta, tra fine anni novanta e inizio anni duemila, tra il clan Di Biasi ... e i Russo

'Ndrina Trovato.description: The 'Ndrina Trovato is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta from Marcedusa, Calabria, Italy. It is involved in drug trafficking and money laundering through construction companies and nightclubs. The clan has established a presence in northern Italy, particularly in Milan, Lecco, Como, and Varese since the early 1980s. It has alliances with other 'ndrine such as the Barbaro, Papalia, and Pelle-Vottari families.

descriptions: Bubbo is allied with Trovato.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata dei ... Trovato

descriptions: The Carvelli are allies of the Trovato.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Trovato e dei Comberiati-Garofalo di Petilia Policastro.

descriptions: Comberiati are allies of Coco-Trovato.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Coco-Trovato

descriptions: Trovato killed Sergio Iazzolino, a boss of Pane-Iazzolino, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 marzo 2004, viene ucciso Sergio Iazzolino boss di Sersale in un bar a Steccato di Cutro da parte dei Trapasso-Zoffreo e dei Trovato .

descriptions: Members of Pelle-Vottari and Coco Trovato were arrested together in a drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: tra cui alcune affiliate ai Pelle-Vottari (tra cui Giuseppe e Domenico Vottari) e ai Coco Trovato

descriptions: The Trovato have alliances with the Barbaro 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno alleanze con le 'ndrine originarie di Platì come i Barbaro , i Papalia e i Sergi

descriptions: The Trovato have a familial link with the De Stefano-Tegano.
edges.evidence_quote: e hanno anche un legame parentale con i De Stefano-Tegano

descriptions: The Trovato have alliances with the Papalia 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno alleanze con le 'ndrine originarie di Platì come i Barbaro , i Papalia e i Sergi

descriptions: The Trovato have alliances with the Pelle-Vottari 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno alleanze con le 'ndrine originarie di Platì come i Barbaro , i Papalia e i Sergi , con i Pelle-Vottari di San Luca

descriptions: The Trovato have an alliance with the Crisafulli clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleanza con il clan Crisafulli di Quarto Oggiaro

descriptions: The Trovato formed an alliance with Pepè Flachi's group, creating the Flachi-Trovato-Schettini triumvirate.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1987 a Caponago venne battezzata un'alleanza col gruppo di Pepè Flachi boss della comasina .

descriptions: Trovato is intranei to the Locale di Galbiate together with Bubbo.
edges.evidence_quote: sarebbero intranei alla " Locale di Galbiate " con i Trovato

descriptions: The Trovato have alliances with the Sergi 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno alleanze con le 'ndrine originarie di Platì come i Barbaro , i Papalia e i Sergi

descriptions: The Caligiuri are allies of the Coco-Trovato.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Farao-Marincola e con i Coco-Trovato .

descriptions: Cappello has ties with Trovato 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Al di fuori della Sicilia invece i Cappello hanno stretto legami con ... le 'ndrine Trovato di Marcedusa

descriptions: Foggia groups allied with Coco Trovato, who are allies of De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: tra i gruppi di Foggia con i Coco Trovato (alleati dei De Stefano )

descriptions: San Francisco Hells Angels sanctioned the East London chapter, establishing it as a charter.
edges.evidence_quote: the first two HAMC charters in Europe were issued; the East London chapter was sanctioned by the San Francisco Hells Angels

'Ndrina Belcastro.description: The Belcastro are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Sant'Ilario dello Ionio, Calabria. They were involved in the Sant'Ilario feud against the D'Agostino clan in the 1990s. Key members include Giuseppe Belcastro, a life-sentenced capobastone, and Domenico Belcastro. The group has been targeted by operations such as Primaluce and Dogville.

descriptions: Belcastro-Romeo and D'Agostino were in conflict in the Sant'Ilario feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sant'Ilario : ... si apre una nuova faida con i Belcastro-Romeo che vogliono distaccarsi dai D'Agostino.

descriptions: Belcastro-Romeo faction is in conflict with D'Agostino.
edges.evidence_quote: si apre una nuova faida tra i Belcastro-Romeo (Giuseppe Belcastro e Tommaso Romeo) che vogliono distaccarsi dai D'Agostino

descriptions: Belcastro and Romeo are allied as a single faction in the faida.
edges.evidence_quote: si apre una nuova faida tra i Belcastro-Romeo (Giuseppe Belcastro e Tommaso Romeo) che vogliono distaccarsi dai D'Agostino

descriptions: Belcastro-Romeo fought against D'Agostino in the Faida di Sant'Ilario.
edges.evidence_quote: si apre una nuova faida tra i Belcastro-Romeo (Giuseppe Belcastro e Tommaso Romeo) si vogliono distaccare dai D'Agostino

descriptions: BWC is a subgroup (set) of 7th.
edges.evidence_quote: There are also members of BWC, a set of 7th

descriptions: The Giglio and Valente were formerly allies but became rivals in a feud starting in 2000.
edges.evidence_quote: Nell'anno 2000 esplode una faida a Strongoli , tra le 'ndrine dei Giglio e dei Valente prima alleate ora in contrasto per il traffico di droga, di armi e delle estorsioni .

descriptions: The Avenues clashed with Frog Town Rifa.
edges.evidence_quote: The Avenues also began to clash with neighboring gangs, such as Highland Park 13, Cypress Park Boys, Toonerville , Frog Town Rifa and Thee Rascals, in an attempt to assert their dominance.

descriptions: Frogtown Rifa is listed as a rival of Toonerville Rifa 13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Armenian Power , The Avenues , Westside Locos The Rascals, Frogtown Rifa , Vineland Boys , MS-13 , Russian mafia , Norte-14

descriptions: Brother Speed allegedly associated with Devils Breed to acquire methamphetamine precursor chemicals.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brother Speed has allegedly associated with the Hells Angels, the Outsiders, and the Devils Breed in order to acquire precursor chemicals used in the manufacture of methamphetamine.

'Ndrina Tripodi.description: The Tripodi are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Vibo Valentia, Italy, allied with the Mancuso clan. They have branches in Lombardy, Lazio, and Veneto. In 2013, Operation Atlantide (later Lybra) led to arrests for vote-buying and corruption, and in 2014, an investigation targeted boss Nicola Tripodi for alleged no-show employment.

descriptions: Accorinti in relationship with Tripodi for heroin trafficking since the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo il pentito Servello gli Accorinti sarebbero in rapporto con i Tripodi di Vibo Valentia sin dagli anni '90 per spaccio di eroina

descriptions: Tripodi is allied with Mancuso.
edges.evidence_quote: I Tripodi sono una 'ndrina di Vibo Valentia alleata dei Mancuso

descriptions: Blue Angels were in a biker war with Satans Slaves in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: The Blue Angels were reportedly involved in a biker war with the Tayside chapter of the Satans Slaves in 2011.

descriptions: Tora Bora Military Front is a subgroup and ally of the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Subgroups ... Tora Bora Military Front (since 2016)

Aryan Guard.description: The Aryan Guard was a neo-Nazi terrorist organization based in Alberta, Canada, primarily in Calgary. Founded in late 2006 by Kyle McKee, it engaged in flyering campaigns targeting immigrants and staged demonstrations. The group was reported to have disbanded in 2009 due to internal conflicts, including pipe bomb attacks, though it denied disbanding.

descriptions: Aryan Guard members bombed a WEB member's home, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On the morning of November 21, 2009, two homemade bombs were left on the doorstep of WEB (Western European Bloodline) member Tyler Sturrup.

Blood Magic Gang.description: A gang of Russian serial killers organized in 2007 by 19-year-old Konstantin Shumkov in Irkutsk, Russia. The gang consisted of teenagers from dysfunctional families who murdered five elderly people, participated in one rape, and injured three others between January and June 2008. Members were sentenced to imprisonment in 2010.

descriptions: The Merlino were allied with the Parrello-Condello faction in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: mentre per la seconda: gli Iemma, i Merlino, i Gullo, i Papasergi, i Papaianni e alcuni esponenti dei Porpiglia, Celi, Anastasio, Crucitti, Zirino, Riotto, Cristofaro e Fameli

descriptions: Dung Hà was romantically involved with Hùng 'the warbler', a gang boss.
edges.evidence_quote: Dung Hà was acquainted with and loved Hùng "the warbler", who was a reputable gang boss in the areas around the bus station and cargo gathering areas alongside the Tam Bạc bus station.

descriptions: Dung Hà and Hùng Cốm cooperated in running casinos and committing crimes.
edges.evidence_quote: Along with her lover Hùng Cốm, Dung Hà started opening up casinos in the area, as the two went on a mass crime spree in the area.

descriptions: Son Bach Tang's Gang is listed as an opponent of Dung Hà in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Nam Cam 's Gang , Son Bach Tang 's Gang , Other gangs from Hanoi, Namdinh, and Haiphong

descriptions: Năm Cam's organization and Dung Hà's gang were in a gang feud, with conflict and confrontations.
edges.evidence_quote: His downfall however came during a gang feud with another notorious female gangster from the northern port city of Haiphong , Dung Hà who was considered one of the two great powers of the Vietnamese underworld alongside Năm Cam.

descriptions: Năm Cam ordered the assassination of Dung Hà after a feud between their gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: On October 2, 2000, Dung Hà was assassinated under orders from Năm Cam, who had previously been in a feud with Dung Hà in Saigon.

descriptions: Uqba ibn Nafi Brigade was a non-state ally of al-Qaeda until 2014.
edges.evidence_quote: Uqba ibn Nafi Brigade (until 2014)

descriptions: Uqba ibn Nafi Brigade is a group within AQIM.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: Uqba ibn Nafi Brigade

Cartel de La Guajira.description: Colombian-Venezuelan criminal organization based in Maicao, Colombia, operating in the La Guajira peninsula and the Venezuelan state of Zulia. Specializes in smuggling, drug trafficking, arms trafficking, extortion, kidnapping, and murder. Founded in Maicao, Colombia, and maintains alliances with the Cartel de los Soles.

descriptions: The Costa cartel's second-in-command was a partner of the Guajira cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Salomón Camacho Mora alias "Papa Grande": Segundo al mando del Cartel de la Costa y socio del Cartel de La Guajira

descriptions: Cartel de La Guajira supplied weapons to the Bloque Norte de las AUC.
edges.evidence_quote: El cartel también trafica con armas en el mercado negro, siendo proveedor del extinto del grupo narcoparamilitar Bloque Norte de las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia (AUC).

descriptions: Clan del Golfo is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Clan del Golfo , Tren de Aragua

descriptions: Los Pingüinos is a band of hitmen and thieves associated with the Cartel de La Guajira.
edges.evidence_quote: Una de las bandas de sicarios y atracadores asociadas al cartel de La Guajira es conocida como "Los Pingüinos"

descriptions: Tren de Aragua is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Clan del Golfo , Tren de Aragua

descriptions: Alianza Fronteriza is listed as an opponent of AGC in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ELN , FARC dissidents , La Oficina , La Empresa , Alianza Fronteriza

descriptions: Latin Scorpions merged with another club to form the Latin Disciples.
edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Scorpions merged with another Latino club ran by Ernesto “Capper” Flores and turned into a full-fledged gang in 1966, calling themselves the Latin Disciples.

descriptions: Founder Rudy Rios was a former member of Latin Scorpions.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang was founded by Rudy Rios, who was a former member of the Latin Scorpions street gang.

descriptions: Babylon Brigades clashed with Nineveh Plains Protection Units over a base.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2023 there was a brief clash between the Babylon Brigades and the Assyrians of Qaraqosh after the former attempted to take control of a base belonging to the Nineveh Plains Protection Units.

descriptions: The Atlantic Guards were allied with the American Guards.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bowery Boys , American Guards, O'Connell Guards, True Blue Americans

descriptions: The Bowery Boys were allied with the American Guards.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: American Guards, Atlantic Guards, Empire Guards, O'Connell Guards, True Blue Americans, American Republican Party (American Nativist Party, American Party), Order of the Star Spangled Banner (Anti-immigrant secret society)

descriptions: American Guards listed as rival of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bowery Boys, Atlantic Guards, O'Connell Guards, American Guards, True Blue Americans, Empire Guards, New York City Police Department

descriptions: A former Ang Soon Tong member joined Loh Kuan, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Leong Fook Weng, a former Ang Soon Tong member, left the gang and joined another gang, Loh Kuan.
